items.title: Employment Report: 22K Jobs Added In August, Lower Than Expected
items.description: The latest employment report showed that 22,000 jobs were added in August, down from 79,000 in July and lower than the expected 75,000 addition.

items.title: Tracking Dan Loeb's Third Point Portfolio - Q2 2025 Update
items.description: Third Point's Q2 2025 13F portfolio rose to $7.62B, with increased concentration in top holdings. Read more about the portfolio here.

items.title: SPYT: 20% Yields And Limits Of Option "Income"
items.description: SPYT promises a 20% annual income using daily S&P 500 call spreads, but this strategy is fundamentally flawed and risky. Read the full analysis here.
